title: First argument to class methods should follow naming convention
description: Enforces that the first argument of class methods follow a specific naming convention.
message: First argument to class method should follow the naming convention.
recommendation: Follow the naming convention for class methods.

noncompliant.description: First argument has an incorrect name.

compliant.description: First argument has a compliant name.

why_is_this_an_issue: Following a naming convention makes the code more readable and understandable for other developers.
how_to_fix: Rename the first argument of the class methods to follow the naming convention.

metadata.title: First argument to class methods should follow naming convention
